name: Lost To Riches
short_description: Fight your way through an army of demons in order to escape Hell's Casino! Utilize a variety of powerful items, weapons and holier than thou upgrades, all the while uncovering a massive conspiracy in this Action Rogue-Lite experience!
detailed_description:
Delve into the depths of the Velvet Angel, an Art Deco themed Casino split across four distinct, hand-crafted floors, run by demonic forces and the enigmatic Mr. Moneybags. Many secrets and cursed trinkets await you within the walls of this casino, and only the most daring can manage their way out, will you?

Play Your Way

Through each run, you will find a variety of different items to choose from, each item having distinct effects that will drastically alter your play-style. Each item augments some part of your character, giving you better stats or new abilities entirely! Unlock more items by defeating bosses, and explore increasingly complex and crazy ways of dealing death to the demonic forces of the casino! Vaporize enemies with exploding bullets, fire bullets that penetrate walls, set things on fire, turn your dash into an explosive, meteoric slam. Use items together and find powerful combinations!

You will also find different weapons that will further change your play-style, blow enemies away with a shotgun, or obliterate enemies using a powerful musket!

Upgrade yourself using the currency found across runs, Casino Chips can be used to bargain with the dark forces of the casino, making you permanently stronger. Equip different pairs of gloves, allowing you to play into different abilities. Every aspect of your abilities can be upgraded, so be sure to collect as many chips as possible!

Explore the Casino

Delve into four distinct floors of the casino, each with their own theme and layout, each level handcrafted to fit the floor’s aesthetic. Each floor has a different enemy variety, with new surprises to discover, in order to escape the casino, you will need to master these rooms and their layouts.

Uncover Hidden Secrets

Not all is as it seems, while there may be demons running a casino, why are they running this casino? For what purpose? Find the lost journal entries of Jeremiah T. Huckleberry, a missing demonologist studying the demonic corruption of the Velvet Angel, and uncover a conspiracy that runs through the heart of the casino!

There are many entries to be read, from the items and weapons you collect, to the various enemies you kill.
